statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
7a8,16
> Nov 29 20:06:19 78c12c6082ca pmie[1113374]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 29 20:06:19 78c12c6082ca pmie[1113374]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 29 20:06:19 78c12c6082ca pmie[1113374]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 29 20:26:03 78c12c6082ca pmie[1394364]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 29 20:26:03 78c12c6082ca pmie[1394364]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 29 20:26:03 78c12c6082ca pmie[1394364]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 29 20:35:00 78c12c6082ca pmie[1503532]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 29 20:35:00 78c12c6082ca pmie[1503532]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 29 20:35:00 78c12c6082ca pmie[1503532]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
